name: Snow Plow Hustle Rustle
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>除</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>雪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>機</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>関</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>車</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ハッスル・ラッセル
desc: When your opponent's monster declares a direct attack, while you control a card(s) in your Spell & Trap Zone: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, then destroy as many cards in your Spell & Trap Zone as possible, and if you do, inflict 200 damage to your opponent for each destroyed card. You cannot Special Summon any monsters, except Machine monsters.
mnst_eff: When your opponent's monster declares a direct attack, while you control a card(s) in your Spell & Trap Zone: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, then destroy as many cards in your Spell & Trap Zone as possible, and if you do, inflict 200 damage to your opponent for each destroyed card. You cannot Special Summon any monsters, except Machine monsters.

sets.set: Legendary Duelists: Sisters of the Rose

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
